description: Audit the field-investigation lane (audit GAP-1): investigation_systems_v30 was audited by no lane and is the home of orphan throughlines T-02 (rendering=consciousness-performed) and T-30 (information asymmetry). ACTION: run the dossier + threadwork-juncture + legibility pass on investigation_systems_v30 (+ fieldwork_v30 overlap) using the 2026-07-04 audit's charter and schemas (01_workings has templates). Note: the 2026-07-05 narrative-engine effort names investigation the natural consumer of diegetic trails — coordinate. RATIFIED-AS-ACCEPTED by Jordan 2026-07-05 (post-merge instruction on PR #77; audit: designs/audit/2026-07-04-ners-qualitative-audit/ed_options.md E-12 (audit GAP-1)).

Counter-espionage loop (edge-playability EP-6). Enemy da.covert_betrayal reaches the player only as a non-interactive Tier-2 cut scene and only when exposed==true; da.antinomian_action and da.economic_intervention (whose nominal consumer settlement_economy is a documented phantom) produce no player-perceptible signal at all; no detection/response verb, scene, or trigger exists anywhere in the §4.3.2/§4.3.3 tables. ACTION: design the detection-and-response loop — fieldwork is the natural host (Exposure already exists as the symmetric mechanic): give rival covert action an investigable trail (Evidence hooks, an exposure-flip path) and a response surface. The one §7 item that is genuine new design rather than wiring. Composes with ED-FI-0001 (investigation-lane audit). RATIFIED-AS-ACCEPTED by Jordan 2026-07-05 ('Ratify all' on PR #81; audit: designs/audit/2026-07-05-edge-playability-audit/edge_playability_audit_v1.md §7 item 7.

OPT-6, filed per Jordan's 2026-07-07 "ratify all" ruling (ED-IN-0026). Knots propagation completion: knots_v30 §6.1/§6.2/§11 brought to the ED-912 gauge (-3 betrayal value, unified rupture threshold, close the §11 catalog), mechanics_index knots primitives refresh, fieldwork_knots gap_note correction, fieldwork_bg co-file re-export (C-FI-4). RESOLVED 2026-07-07 (Stratum-A execution, this PR): knots_v30 §6.1/§6.2/§11/§13/§14 propagated to the ED-912 −5..+5 gauge; mechanics_index knots primitives + module_contracts fieldwork_knots gap_note refreshed; fieldwork_bg co-file re-exported (RS→MS, PP-630). Residual: §6.2 Coherence-loss rule marked [UNVERIFIED post-ED-912]; sim/personal/knots.py rebuild (C-TW-12) is separate Stratum-B work.

RATIFIED subtractive verdicts for the FI action set (ED-IN-0027; decision ratified, EXECUTION this FI-lane follow-up). Interview MERGE — collapse the live two-document supersession contradiction (investigation_systems_v30:425 asserts 'instead of' total replacement of the single-roll object vs the fieldwork single-roll spec) to one Jordan-ruled direction per cluster_C-FI.md; retires the fieldwork half of ED-921 + ED-IN-0016/EP-8. Dialogue-Lattice utterance-selection REFINE (the composed 5-filter chain already produced an unnoticed internal contradiction, C-FI-2 — simplify/expose, don't discard). Examine/Research/Surveil/Thread-Read/Reconstruct all KEEP (five distinct evidence methodologies). Docket rows: ed_options.md FI section. · EXECUTED 2026-07-08 (FI-lane follow-up to ED-IN-0027, resolves this ED). Interview MERGE: the fieldwork_v30 §4.2 bare-roll Interview object is annotated as superseded by the Dialogue Lattice (investigation_systems_v30 System 3 / S14, which its own Cross-System table already says supersedes the single Charisma roll) -- the Lattice is now the single canonical Interview home; the bare-roll row is retained as the current mechanical baseline until the ED-921 schedule/attribute reconciliation + a CURRENT.md fieldwork row settle governance (retires ED-921 + the fieldwork half of ED-IN-0016/EP-8 to one ruling). Dialogue Lattice REFINE: the five-filter Response-Matrix chain gets a build-gating requirement for a compact 'why this NPC responded' player-facing readout (composed-system Q-elegant strain), Lattice design + Certainty Gate KEPT -- an ordinary design-completeness finding, not a scope cut. No sim edits (investigation.py/fieldwork.py are NotImplementedError stubs). Gates green. Decision packet prepared 2026-07-08 for the Interview canonical-head governance residual: designs/audit/2026-07-08-pessimist-action-audit/decision_packets/DP-4_FI_interview_canonical_head.md separates design-merit (settled by this ED) from governance (open -- Option B full port vs Option C split-head staging) for Jordan to rule -- no new ED allocated yet.

Knot Pool formula ratification (OPT-AV-9, attribute/value coherence audit ED-IN-0029) -- four non-agreeing live formulas found (census C3-F1). RATIFIED: (Spirit x2) + History(Relevant) + 3; Bonds stays an eligibility-gate only, not an additive term. NOTE the ratification's own scope caveat: ED-920's ledger entry covers only the fieldwork variant -- widening its citation to cover Knot Pool generally needs this explicit acknowledgment, recorded here. EXECUTION DEFERRED to the FI lane: reconcile the four carrying surfaces to this formula, add a pool regression test per the audit's C3-F2 finding. Decision-ratified, execution pending -- filed per the session-lane-scoping convention (an IN-lane audit does not itself edit FI-owned files).

Wound penalty to physical fieldwork is stated two contradictory ways within fieldwork_v30.md. SS2.2 (L72): 'Physical wounds add +0.15 Ob per wound (cumulative -- NEVER a -1D pool cut; Jordan ruling 2026-07-08, ED-PC-0005 ... calibrated ED-PC-0006)'. SS2.3 System Transition Rules (L104): 'Wounds persist (-1D to physical fieldwork per wound, per SS2.2)' -- asserting the exact -1D rule SS2.2 explicitly forbids, AND mis-citing SS2.2 as its authority. ED-PC-0005/0006 already made the canonical call (+0.15 Ob/wound, never -1D); this is an un-propagated stale statement in the same doc. Proposed remediation: rewrite SS2.3's wound clause to '+0.15 Ob per wound' consistent with SS2.2. Companion to ED-FI-0007 (SS2.4, same wound-language class) -- may be executed as one combined wound-language propagation. Surfaced by the 2026-07-13 multi-agent audit (mechanic_audit GAP-1).
source: designs/audit/2026-07-13-multi-agent-audit/ (report SS5 item 14 / mechanic_audit GAP-1); verified against fieldwork_v30.md L72 vs L104

description: fieldwork_v30.md SS2.4 (L141) still states the wound penalty to Thread-Read/Leap operations as a flat '+1 Ob' ('wounds apply +1 Ob to Thread operations requiring Leap'). The co-file params/fieldwork.md (patched under ED-PC-0006) explicitly supersedes this: L231 'Wounds and Thread ops: +0.15 Ob per wound to Leap-based Thread ops ... The prior "+1 Ob" figure predates the ED-PC-0005 ruling and is superseded by this calibration.' The design-doc source was never swept to match its own patched params mirror. Proposed remediation: replace SS2.4's '+1 Ob' with '+0.15 Ob per wound (cumulative)' per ED-PC-0006. Companion to ED-FI-0006 (SS2.2/SS2.3, same wound-language class); may be executed as one combined wound-language propagation. Surfaced by the 2026-07-13 multi-agent audit (mechanic_audit GAP-2).
source: designs/audit/2026-07-13-multi-agent-audit/ (report SS5 item 15 / mechanic_audit GAP-2); verified against fieldwork_v30.md L141 vs params/fieldwork.md L231

description: P-06 philosophy violation (canon/02_canon_constraints.md P-06: 'Threadcut beings have no layer 2 ... Coherence does not apply -- layer-two self-rendering is absent by structure ... FAIL if the mechanic applies Coherence to threadcut beings'). fieldwork_v30.md SS5.6b 'Threadcut being Knots' (L529) applies Coherence to a threadcut being: 'strain on the Knot also drains the threadcut being's Coherence at +0.5 per strain (round up). When threadcut Coherence reaches 0, the Knot collapses.' The IDENTICAL defect is replicated in designs/personal/knots_v30.md SS9 'Threadcut Beings and Knots' (L279, 'Threadcut Knot collapse alternate trigger: Per fieldwork SS5.6b ... drains the threadcut being's Coherence at +0.5 per strain'). knots_v30.md SS9 already carries the CORRECT replacement model alongside it (L275 'Self-maintenance strain: +1 self-maintenance strain per Knot use', matching the fieldwork_v30 SS2.8 threadcut self-maintenance model). Proposed remediation: replace the Coherence-drain trigger in BOTH files with the self-maintenance-strain cost. MUST fix both files in one pass -- knots_v30.md sits outside the fieldwork canonical_sources entries and would otherwise be missed. Surfaced by the 2026-07-13 multi-agent audit (mechanic_audit Mode E / P-06).
source: designs/audit/2026-07-13-multi-agent-audit/ (report SS5 item 16 / mechanic_audit Mode E); verified against fieldwork_v30.md L529, designs/personal/knots_v30.md L269-279, canon/02_canon_constraints.md P-06
